mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_tool_audit_log ( register_id, doctor_id, session_id, request_id, tool_name, risk_level, request_payload, response_payload, before_snapshot, after_snapshot, confirm_source, confirmation_token, success, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{doctorId}, #{sessionId}, #{requestId}, #{toolName}, #{riskLevel}, #{requestPayload}, #{responsePayload}, #{beforeSnapshot}, #{afterSnapshot}, #{confirmSource}, #{confirmationToken}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, register_id AS registerId, session_id AS sessionId, tool_name AS toolName, success, created_at AS createdAt FROM agent_tool_audit_log WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND success = TRUE AND tool_name LIKE 'copilot_confirm_%' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
